stories.title: How the conflict in Iran is affecting global markets
stories.description: Escalation of the Iran conflict is sending shockwaves through global markets — driving up oil, fuel, and commodity prices, stoking inflation and recession risks worldwide. We hear from three NPR reporters in Europe, Asia and Russia.

stories.title: U.S. military bombs Kharg Island, Iran's main oil export hub, Trump says
stories.description: President Trump said on Friday the U.S. military had "totally obliterated" military targets in Kharg Island, home to the primary terminal that handles Iran's oil exports. This as all six crew members on a refueling plane that went down in western Iraq were confirmed dead.

stories.title: These are the casualties and cost of the war in Iran 2 weeks into the conflict
stories.description: The war in Iran has already cost the U.S. billions of dollars. Here's the impact by the numbers.

stories.title: Ukrainian President Zelenskyy concerned as U.S. suspends Russia sanctions
stories.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy meets French President Emmanuel Macron in Paris to increase pressure on Russia, as the U.S. suspends oil sanctions.

stories.title: CNN correspondent shares his takeaways from his recent visit to Iran
stories.description: NPR's Steve Inskeep asks CNN's Fred Pleitgen for his takeaways from his recent reporting trip to Iran.

stories.title: U.S. military bombs Iran's main oil export hub, as Mideast war toll mounts
stories.description: President Trump said on Friday the U.S. military had "totally obliterated every MILITARY target in Iran's crown jewel, Kharg Island." This, as all six crew members on a refueling plane that went down in western Iraq were confirmed dead.

stories.title: Why has the US targeted Iran's Kharg Island?
stories.description: The tiny island is home to one of the most critical pieces of Iran's energy infrastructure.

stories.title: Hamas urges key ally Iran to halt attacks on Gulf states
stories.description: The Palestinian group also affirms Tehran's right to defend itself from "aggression" by the US and Israel.

stories.title: Under drone fire, exiled Kurds wait to confront Iranian regime
stories.description: A group of fighters based in Iraq say they are "ready to go home", as they face drone attacks from Tehran.

stories.title: Iranians react to new supreme leader's first address
stories.description: People in Iran are questioning who's really in charge after Mojtaba Khamenei's first address came via a presenter on state TV.

stories.title: 'There's no hiding place on a ship': The sailors stranded near Iran
stories.description: Drones, cruise missiles and fighter jets have become a common sight for many sailors stranded on ships in the Gulf.

stories.title: Bodies of 84 Iranian sailors killed in US torpedo strike to be repatriated
stories.description: The seamen died when Iranian warship the Iris Dena was sunk on 4 March by a US submarine near Sri Lanka.

stories.title: 'Follow the smoke': BBC spends day with emergency teams as Israel strikes south Lebanon
stories.description: The BBC visited the city of Nabatieh, witnessing the pace and scale of Israel's bombing as its war with Hezbollah continues to escalate.

stories.title: Tracking the wave of ship attacks that has choked off Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Six ships have been reportedly attacked in the Gulf in less than 48 hours, bringing the total vessels attacked during the war to 18.

stories.title: Iran's new supreme leader vows to block Strait of Hormuz in first statement
stories.description: A message attributed to Mojtaba Khamenei also says Iran will continue targeting US bases in the region.

stories.title: Emirati minister tells BBC Iran must end strikes on Gulf
stories.description: The UAE says more than 1,800 drones and missiles have been projected at the country since the war began.

stories.title: 'What if we're left with ruins?': Doubts creep in for Iranians who supported war
stories.description: Teachers, engineers and shopkeepers tell the BBC they fear Iran falling into chaos.

stories.title: Israel pounds Beirut suburbs and south Lebanon after Hezbollah rocket barrage
stories.description: Some Israeli strikes also hit other parts of the Lebanese capital, with 12 people reportedly killed along the seafront.

stories.title: British man charged in Dubai for alleged filming of Iranian missiles
stories.description: Foreign Office officials are understood to be supporting his family.

stories.title: 'Fingers on the trigger': Deadly warnings for Iranians being urged to take action
stories.description: Iran's police chief has warned that his forces would treat anyone taking to the streets "at the enemy's request" as an enemy.

stories.title: Questions mount for Hegseth over possible US involvement in strike on Iranian school
stories.description: Democrats have written to ask the defence secretary whether the US was responsible, but he says the issue is being investigated.

stories.title: NATO defence systems shoot down Iranian ballistic missile over Turkey
stories.description: Turkey's defence ministry says a ballistic missile fired from Iran and heading into Turkish airspace after passing Syria and Iraq was destroyed by NATO air and missile defence systems in the eastern Mediterranean Sea. It's the third such incident since the war began. Turkey's pre...

stories.title: Two weeks into the war in the Middle East - What happens next?
stories.description: This Saturday marks two weeks since the US and Israel launched their first attacks on Iran. Where are we at in this conflict, what has it taught us, and where does it go from here? Scott Lucas, a Professor of US and International Politics at University College Dublin's Clinton In...

stories.title: French soldier killed by Iranian drone was on anti-jihad mission in Iraq
stories.description: The French officer killed by an Iranian-made drone on Thursday was part of a Western military contingent working to combat potential jihadists in Iraqi Kurdistan. The killing of Chief Warrant Officer Arnaud Frion marks France's first military death in the Middle East war.

stories.title: US military bombs military sites on Kharg island, Iranian media reports no damage
stories.description: President Donald Trump said the US destroyed military sites on an island vital to Iran’s oil network and warned that its oil infrastructure could be next if Iran continues to interfere with the passage of ships through the Strait of Hormuz. Iran's Fars news agency, citing sources...

stories.title: Residents refuse to leave the Lebanese Hezbollah bastion of Tyre despite Israeli strikes
stories.description: As Israel has ramped up attacks on south Lebanon it has called for residents to evacuate – but some in the Hezbollah stronghold of Tyre are refusing to leave their homes and businesses despite the danger.

stories.title: Qatar turns to desert farming to boost food security
stories.description: Since the 2017 embargo, one of Qatar’s greatest nightmares has been that a war or geopolitical crisis would isolate Doha from the rest of the world. In late February, renewed tensions following the Israeli-American offensive against Iran brought these concerns to the fore once ag...

stories.title: Middle East war live: US hits more than 90 targets on Kharg Island, Iran vows to retaliate
stories.description: US forces struck more than 90 Iranian military targets in a major attack on Kharg Island, a vital oil hub, while "preserving the oil infrastructure", US Central Command said on Saturday as the war entered its third week. Iran said there were no casualties and has threatened to ta...

stories.title: Explosion shakes Tehran amid state-organised rally after Israeli warning
stories.description: A blast rocked a major pro-Palestinian rally in Tehran on Friday after Israel warned it could target the area, as the nearly two-week war between Israel and Iran escalated across the Middle East. Washington ordered roughly 2,500 additional Marines to the region, bolstering its mi...

stories.title: Trump’s Iran Strategy: Former US State Department official Jennifer Gavito speaks to France 24
stories.description: France 24’s Gavin Lee speaks with Jennifer Gavito, former US diplomat and Senior Advisor at The Cohen Group, about Washington’s strategy in the current conflict and what President Donald Trump is seeking to achieve. They discuss the objectives behind the US military campaign, the...

stories.title: Iran: A 'Nepo-Ayatollah', the 'Hubris trap" & the costs of a "very complete war"
stories.description: It’s been a week that’s seen a new Ayatollah proclaimed in Iran. Mojtaba Khamenei, son of the assassinated supreme leader Ali Khamenei, has not been seen in public and is believed to be in hiding after reportedly being injured in the same strike that killed his father. State tele...

stories.title: How will Russia benefit from US decision to ease oil sanctions?
stories.description: The United States has eased some restrictions on Russian oil, letting shipments already at sea continue until early April in the aim of calming global markets amid Iran’s blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Ukraine and European leaders criticised the move, saying it undermined peac...

stories.title: War in the Middle East: A sailor stranded in the Gulf fears for his safety
stories.description: Since the beginning of the conflict in the Middle East, many merchant vessels have been stranded in the Gulf, as the Strait of Hormuz has become a high-risk area following several attacks attributed to Iran. Among them is Wang Shang, a Chinese sailor aboard a cargo ship, who desc...

stories.title: ‘We cut down the menu’: Cooking gas crisis hits restaurants in India amid war in Iran
stories.description: Restaurants in India are suffering the consequences of disruptions to supplies of cooking gas caused by the war in the Middle East. Two restaurant owners describe the mounting challenges of operating under the crisis and the measures they’re taking to adapt.

stories.title: Two Indian ships cross Strait of Hormuz as Iran says it allowed passage
stories.description: Iran's envoy to New Delhi says Tehran allowed some Indian vessels to pass the Strait in rare exception to the blockade.

stories.title: Another 5 Palestinians killed in Israel’s genocide in Gaza amid wider war
stories.description: Israeli forces carry out daily attacks on besieged Gaza, as humanitarian conditions amid Iran war worsen.

stories.title: Family pulled from the rubble after US-Israeli strikes on Tehran
stories.description: Video shows rescue teams rescuing families from under the rubble after US-Israeli strikes hit residential areas in Tehra

stories.title: The battle on the propaganda front intensifies
stories.description: As the US and Israel battle to control the story of their war against Iran, their messaging gets harder to defend.

stories.title: Hamas urges Iran to halt attacks on Gulf, slams aggression on Tehran
stories.description: The Palestinian group calls for end to Gulf attacks while supporting Tehran’s right to defend against Israel and US.

stories.title: More than 110 people killed in Iran’s Kurdistan: Official
stories.description: At least 112 killed in US-Israel attacks on Iran’s Kurdistan province, with 969 injured, local officials say.

stories.title: Iran continues intensified attacks across Gulf in US-Israel war fallout
stories.description: Strikes target multiple countries, including Saudi Arabia and Qatar, overnight with interceptions reported.

stories.title: US attacks military sites on Iran’s Kharg island, home to vast oil facility
stories.description: Tehran threatens to reduce US-linked oil facilities to 'pile of ashes' if oil structures on the island are attacked.

stories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 15 of US-Israel attacks?
stories.description: US hits Iran’s Kharg island as it warns oil sites may be next if Tehran disrupts shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.title: Yemeni ports face shipping fee hike amid Iran conflict
stories.description: Yemen’s government rejects new shipping surcharges, as fears grow of humanitarian crisis.

stories.title: Iran announces new wave of missile strikes on Israel — public broadcaster
stories.description: Air raid sirens have been ringing out in Tel Aviv and adjacent areas in central Israel

stories.title: Iran attacks US military objects in UAE, Kuwait, Bahrain — IRGC
stories.description: Iranian missiles and UAVs struck Patriot radars, a control tower, and anti-aircraft installations at the Al-Dhafra base, the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps reported

stories.title: Pentagon reports strikes on 90 military targets on Iran's Kharg Island
stories.description: But the Islamic Republic’s oil industry facilities located there were not affected, CENTCOM said

stories.title: Israeli army reports destruction of Iranian Space Agency research center
stories.description: In addition, strikes targeted several facilities involved in the production of air defense systems, the military stated

stories.title: Iran wants deal but proposes terms unacceptable to Washington, Trump says
stories.description: "The fake news media hates to report how well the United States military has done against Iran, which is totally defeated and wants a deal - but not a deal that I would accept," the US President wrote on Truth Social

stories.title: Global markets now in dire need of Russian oil — Kremlin
stories.description: Earlier, the US lifted sanctions on the sale of oil and petroleum products from Russia loaded onto ships before March 12

stories.title: Many countries want to buy oil from Russia following relaxation of US sanctions — Kremlin
stories.description: Dmitry Peskov noted that the markets are indeed vast

stories.title: US Navy set to escort soon oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz — President Trump
stories.description: US President Donald Trump said in response to the corresponding question from journalists

stories.title: US Army delivers powerful strike on Iran’s Kharg Island, says President Trump
stories.description: Donald Trump emphasized that the US armed forces "totally obliterated every military target on the island"

stories.title: US President Trump: 'Iran will never have a nuclear weapon'
stories.description: Donald Trump noted that for Iran it "would be wise to lay down their arms"

stories.title: Military operation against Iran to last 'as long as necessary' — US President Trump
stories.description: The US President also said that American and Israeli objectives during the military operation against Iran may be a little different

stories.title: At least six killed in air attack on Iran’s central province of Markazi — agency
stories.description: According to the news agency, seven more people were wounded

stories.title: Energy crisis in Europe cannot be overcome without Russia — Orban
stories.description: Hungarian Prime Minister stated that Brussels does not want to know anything about the suspension of sanctions against Russian energy

stories.title: Trump says to end operation against Iran when intuition tells him to
stories.description: The US leader also said that prices for oil and other commodities would begin to decline immediately after the end of the operation

stories.title: Iran uses solid-fuel ballistic missiles to attack Israel — IRGC
stories.description: Among the targets were "places of the deployment of American soldiers in the region"

stories.title: DPRK slams U.S. for orchestrating efforts to tighten financial sanctions against Pyongyang
stories.description: The Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK) has slammed the United States for orchestrating efforts to tighten financial sanctions against Pyongyang.
